intent: Wide-shell 2BR / 2 baths DISTRIBUTED, no hall, both bedrooms direct-to-great — 14x11 lot, NO CARPORT. Envelope 10x7 = 70 m² floor, within the topology's 65-85 m² buildable band. Bedroom column (left): master front, ensuite mid (sandwiched, master's exclusive), standard rear. Both master and standard door directly east into the great room. Common bath's only door opens onto the great room (bedroom<->common-bath is always wall-only per the codebase's generic rule). Common bath and kitchen share a rear wet-stack. Great_room + kitchen form one open LDK on the right.
must_haves: master ensuite sandwiched between master and standard (distributed, not clustered)
both master and standard door directly into the great room, no hall
common bath accessible from the great room
wet-stack between common bath and kitchen
